name: Pmet Resources Inc.
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 34 EMA at A$0.6570. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.6566 where 4 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.6570, stop A$0.5197, target A$0.6600. Risk/reward is 0.02:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
